{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine'''|諏訪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine'''|諏訪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine'''|諏訪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine'''|諏訪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine'''|諏訪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine'''|諏訪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine'''|諏訪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine'''|諏訪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine'''|諏訪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Suwa Shrine'''|諏訪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].
